meta.note: Pre-loaded real scan result for demo purposes.

nuclei_findings.name: CRIME SSL/TLS Attack
nuclei_findings.description: The remote service has SSL/TLS compression enabled which may allow an attacker to recover plaintext secrets.
nuclei_findings.remediation: Disable SSL/TLS compression on the server.

nuclei_findings.name: Exposed Git Configuration
nuclei_findings.description: A .git/config file is publicly accessible. This can expose internal repository information, remote URLs, and branch names.
nuclei_findings.remediation: Restrict access to .git directory via web server configuration.

nuclei_findings.name: SQL Injection Detected
nuclei_findings.description: A SQL injection vulnerability was detected. The parameter cat is vulnerable to error-based SQL injection.
extracted_results: MySQL error: You have an error in your SQL syntax
Tables: artists, carts, categ, featured, guestbook, pictures, products, users
nuclei_findings.remediation: Use parameterized queries or prepared statements.

nuclei_findings.name: Reflected Cross-Site Scripting
nuclei_findings.description: A reflected XSS vulnerability exists in the test parameter of search.php.
nuclei_findings.remediation: Encode all user-supplied output. Implement Content Security Policy headers.

nuclei_findings.name: Stored Cross-Site Scripting
nuclei_findings.description: A stored XSS vulnerability exists in the guestbook form.
nuclei_findings.remediation: Sanitize and validate all user input before storing.

nuclei_findings.name: Local File Inclusion
nuclei_findings.description: A Local File Inclusion vulnerability was found. /etc/passwd contents were readable.
nuclei_findings.remediation: Validate and sanitize all file path inputs. Use a whitelist of allowed files.

nuclei_findings.name: Default Credentials Found
nuclei_findings.description: Default credentials admin:test123 were accepted by the login form.
nuclei_findings.remediation: Enforce strong password policies. Remove all default credentials.

zap_findings.description: SQL injection may be possible on the cat parameter.

zap_findings.solution: Validate all input and sanitize output.

zap_findings.alert: Content Security Policy Header Not Set
zap_findings.description: Content Security Policy header is missing.
zap_findings.solution: Configure Content-Security-Policy header on your web server.

zap_findings.description: A cookie has been set without the secure flag.
zap_findings.solution: Set the Secure flag on all sensitive cookies.

top_priority_fixes: Fix SQL Injection on listproducts.php immediately
Fix Local File Inclusion on showimage.php
